ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insect_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insect species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the insect species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the insect species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the insect species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the species */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth trait */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the trait */,
  "reference_literature" TEXT /* Reference literature for the trait definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental conditions */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the observation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the observation */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity during the observation */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the observation */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the observation was made */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Qualitative description of weather conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insect species */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the growth trait observed */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental conditions */,
  "bmax" REAL /* Maximum growth rate */,
  "bmaxLwr" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the maximum growth rate */,
  "bmaxUpr" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the maximum growth rate */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of insects observed */,
  "observation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the observation period in days */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., experiment, field study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES environmental_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES insect_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_data_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_id") REFERENCES growth_traits ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Organization or institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Browser or application used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES growth_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
